user.title: User
user.description: User profile containing push notification configurations

id.description: Unique identifier of the user matching their auth UID

fcm_token.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging device token used for push notifications

support_ticket.title: Support Ticket
support_ticket.description: Fallback support ticket storing state of active human help requests

support_message.title: Support Message
support_message.description: Fallback chat message stored under support ticket messages subcollection

users/{userId}.description: Collection storing user configurations and PWA push tokens

support_tickets/{userId}.description: Fallback collection tracking human help requests in real-time

support_tickets/{userId}/messages/{messa.description: Fallback collection containing individual chat messages under a ticket
